title: Agent Manifest v1
description: THE SEAM. Both the standing review agent and the deterministic workflow read from this file. Its name (agent.manifest.yaml) and location (repo root) are THE anchor — the one hardcoded thing in the whole system.

apiVersion.description: Contract version the gate enforces against. Bumping it drives the migration levers.

profile.description: Selects a behavior set from the platform-owned library (extensibility lever — e.g. add a TS frontend agent type WITHOUT forking the agent).

packageManager.description: The field Scenario B (pip -> poetry -> uv) flips.

paths.description: The fields Scenario A (structure move) flips. The agent and the deterministic steps resolve code locations from here — nothing is hardcoded.

commands.description: Declared lifecycle commands. The workflow runs EXACTLY these; CI knows nothing toolchain-specific.
